category_sources: source_facts.description says it downloads and assembles multipart binaries from newsgroups; SourceForge project categorizes it under Usenet News.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is brag; official SourceForge project title is brag.
docs_sources: Official project web site is the best documentation surface supplied by the project.
repo_sources: Official SourceForge project includes a Code tab for project source control.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and SourceForge summary describe collecting and assembling multipart binary attachments from newsgroups.
